Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 53 

SEX_IDENT_CD 

LABEL: Sex 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the sex of the beneficiary. 

LONG NAME: SEX_IDENT_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: 0 = Unknown 
1 = Male 
2 = Female 

COMMENT: —
